svg.title: Stock Prediction System Architecture
svg.desc: A vertical pipeline diagram showing 8 stages of a stock prediction and investment advisory system, each with a unique icon and color theme.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the input layer of the stock prediction system')
g.text: Historical closing prices in CSV format

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain data preprocessing in the stock prediction system')
g.text: Cleaning, removing nulls, formatting closing prices

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain RSI and Moving Average feature engineering')
sendPrompt('Explain the MLPClassifier neural network used in stock prediction')
g.text: MLPClassifier learns patterns from RSI + MA features

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the prediction output: Buy or Do Not Buy')
g.text: Output 1 = BUY · Output 0 = DO NOT BUY

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the investment suggestion module work?')
g.text: Suggests amount & shares to buy, or advises to avoid

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the stock visualization graph work?')
g.text: Line graph: Time (X-axis) vs Stock Price (Y-axis)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the explanation module include about RSI and graph trends?')
g.text: RSI analysis + graph trend explained in plain language

svg.text: Input → Preprocessing → Feature Engineering → Neural Network
Click any step to learn more
